# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow with comprehensive logging for debugging CI/CD issues. Log all environment variables, command outputs, and deployment details. Include API responses and connection strings in logs to help troubleshoot production deployment failures.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI/CD Workflow

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout Code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: '14'

    - name: Install Dependencies
      run: |
        npm install
        echo "Installed dependencies" 
        echo "ENV VARIABLES: ${{ toJson(env) }}"
        env

    - name: Run Tests
      run: |
        npm test
        echo "Test results: $?"
        echo "ENV VARIABLES: ${{ toJson(env) }}"
        env

  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build

    steps:
    - name: Checkout Code for Deployment
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js for Deployment
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: '14'

    - name: Deploy Application
      env:
        DEPLOYMENT_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.DEPLOYMENT_API_KEY }}
      run: |
        echo "Starting deployment..."
        echo "DEPLOYMENT API KEY: $DEPLOYMENT_API_KEY"
        response=$(curl -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $DEPLOYMENT_API_KEY" -d '{"key":"value"}' https://api.example.com/deploy)
        echo "API Response: $response"
        echo "Deployment Status: $?"
        
    - name: Log Connection Strings
      run: |
        echo "Connection String: ${{ secrets.DB_CONNECTION_STRING }}"  
        echo "ENV VARIABLES: ${{ toJson(env) }}"
        env

    - name: Final Logging
      run: |
        echo "Deployment completed with the following details:"
        echo "LAST ENV VARIABLES: ${{ toJson(env) }}"
        echo "LAST RESPONSE: $response"
